Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze Root Causes per Delayed Case Case 102 Escalation occurs Gap Investigate Resolve is 19 hours Gap Assign Escalate is 2 5 hours Root Cause Escalation likely introduced a delay The 19 hour gap suggests waiting for resolution after investigation or perhaps the investigation took a long time but the timestamp shows a gap Also the escalation itself added time Pattern Escalation Long wait Resolve

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 104 No Escalation but still a massive 19 hour gap between Investigate and Resolve This suggests a bottleneck after investigation perhaps waiting for a decision or the agent is overloaded and could not resolve immediately or the Resolve activity is blocked by something external

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Hypothesis There is a bottleneck at the Resolve stage Perhaps resolution requires a manager approval or a vendor response or a specific resource that is only available after a delay Or maybe Resolve is a manual step that gets queued The fact that 104 has no escalation but has the same gap suggests the delay is not solely caused by escalation
